name: ElmFire.Op

unions.name: Dispatch
unions.comment: Opaque type representing a dispatch mode

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment:
The target of all operations is described in a configuration record:

- `location`: Pointer to the Firebase path (e.g. `ElmFire.fromUrl "https://.../..."`).
- `orderOptions`: Filter and limit elements according to a given order. Use `ElmFire.noOrder` if not needed.
- `encoder`: Function to convert Elm values into JSON values according to the Firebase's schema.
- `decoder`: A Json.Decoder used to convert a JSON value from the Firebase into the corresponding Elm value.

Decoding errors are silently ignored in all operations (if they need the decoder at all).
aliases.type: { location : Location, orderOptions : OrderOptions, encoder : v -> Value, decoder : Decoder v }

values.name: atomic
values.comment: Perform the whole operation as a single transaction.

values.name: empty
values.comment: Dlete the whole collection.

values.name: filter
values.comment: Remove those elements that don't satisfy a predicate.

values.name: filterMap
values.comment: Apply a function to modify or remove values.
values.type: Dispatch -> (String -> v -> Maybe v) -> Operation v

values.name: forwardOperation
values.comment: Creates a new address for receiving operations with a fixed configuration.
values.type: Address (Task Error Reference) -> Config v -> Address (Operation v)

values.name: fromDict
values.comment: Initialize the collection from a dictionary.
values.type: Dispatch -> Dict String v -> Operation v

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Initialize the collection from a list of key-value pairs.
values.type: Dispatch -> List ( String, v ) -> Operation v

values.name: insert
values.comment: Insert a single key-value pair, possible overwriting the previous value.

values.name: insertList
values.comment: Insert a list of key-value pairs.
values.type: Dispatch -> List ( String, v ) -> Operation v

values.name: map
values.comment: Apply a function to modify all values.

values.name: none
values.comment: Do nothing.

values.name: operate
values.comment: Task to perform an operation with a given configuration.
values.type: Config v -> Operation v -> Task Error Reference

values.name: parallel
values.comment:
Perform the operation for each affected element in parallel.
Will be executed asynchronously (due to a Task module restriction).

values.name: push
values.comment: Insert a single key-value pair. This generates a new child location using a unique key.

values.name: remove
values.comment: Remove the element with the given key.

values.name: removeList
values.comment: Remove selected elements by a list of keys.

values.name: sequential
values.comment: Perform the operation step-by-step for each affected element in a sequential manner.

values.name: update
values.comment: Update a single value for a specific key with a given function.
values.type: String -> (Maybe v -> Maybe v) -> Operation v

name: ElmFire.Dict

unions.name: Delta
unions.comment: Represents a single update reported from the Firebase.

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment:
Each query target is described by a configuration:

- `location`: Pointer to the Firebase path, e.g. `ElmFire.fromUrl "https://.../..."`.
- `orderOptions`: Filter and limit elements according to a given order. Use `ElmFire.noOrder` if not needed.
- `encoder`: Function to convert Elm values into JSON values according to the Firebase's schema.
  `encoder` is used only in module `ElmFire.Op`, but is present here because the type `Config` is shared between these two modules.
- `decoder`: A Json.Decoder used to convert a JSON value from the Firebase into the corresponding Elm value.

Decoding errors are reported as the special `Delta` value `Undecodable String String`.
They are silently ignored in all other functions of this module.
aliases.type: { location : Location, orderOptions : OrderOptions, encoder : v -> Value, decoder : Decoder v }

values.name: getDict
values.comment: One-time query, mapping the Firebase store to a dictionary
values.type: Config v -> Task Error (Dict String v)

values.name: getKeys
values.comment: One-time query, resulting in a list of keys (without values)

values.name: getList
values.comment: One-time query, mapping the Firebase store to a list of key-value pairs
values.type: Config v -> Task Error (List ( String, v ))

values.name: getValues
values.comment: One-time query, resulting in a list of values (without keys)

values.name: integrate
values.comment: Integrate a signal of deltas, returning a signal of dictionaries.

values.name: mirror
values.comment:
Convenience function that combines subscribing to and integrating of deltas.
It returns a 2-tuple:

- First element is a task that must be executed in order to subscribe to the Firebase updates.
  Its success result can be used for unsubscribing again.
- Second element is a signal of the dictionary that consecutively mirrors the Firebase collection.
values.type: Config v -> ( Task Error (Task Error ()), Signal (Dict String v) )

values.name: subscribeDelta
values.comment:
Get the initial state from the Firebase and subscribe to subsequent updates.
The resulting deltas are sent to a given mailbox.

The success-result is a task that may be executed later to unsubscribe again.
values.type: Address (Delta v) -> Config v -> Task Error (Task Error ())

values.name: update
values.comment: Update a dictionary by applying a single given delta.
values.type: Delta v -> Dict String v -> Dict String v
